ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "context_sets" (
  "context_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context set */,
  "context_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the context set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the context set */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Type of the context set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the context set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_sets" (
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "feature_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature set */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., decision tree, random forest, neural network) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "context_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the context set used for evaluation */,
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature set used for evaluation */,
  "valid_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy of the model */,
  "valid_precision" REAL /* Validation precision of the model */,
  "valid_recall" REAL /* Validation recall of the model */,
  "valid_f1_score" REAL /* Validation F1-score of the model */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy of the model */,
  "test_precision" REAL /* Test precision of the model */,
  "test_recall" REAL /* Test recall of the model */,
  "test_f1_score" REAL /* Test F1-score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_context_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_set_id") REFERENCES context_sets ("context_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_feature_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_set_id") REFERENCES feature_sets ("feature_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the model */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user the model is shared with */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being discussed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user posting the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discussion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the architecture belongs to */,
  "architecture_type" TEXT /* Type of the architecture (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "architecture_description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the architecture was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the architecture was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_architectures_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the training data belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  "context_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the context set used for training */,
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature set used for training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_testing_data" (
  "testing_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the testing data belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for testing */,
  "context_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the context set used for testing */,
  "feature_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature set used for testing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the testing data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the testing data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_testing_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
